name: Sandisk Corp
business: Sandisk develops, manufactures, and provides data storage devices and solutions based on NAND flash technology. Its portfolio includes solid-state drives, embedded products, removable cards, universal serial bus drives, and wafers and components. The company serves the Cloud, Client, and Consumer end markets.

exposures.sentence: Our broad and ever-expanding portfolio delivers powerful flash storage solutions for AI workloads in datacenters, edge devices, and consumers.
Cloud is comprised primarily of products for datacenters, cloud service providers, and private cloud customers.
Our broad and ever-expanding portfolio delivers powerful flash storage solutions for AI workloads in datacenters, edge devices, and consumers.
Sandisk is a leading developer, manufacturer and provider of data storage devices and solutions based on NAND flash technology.

Through the Client end market, we provide our original equipment manufacturer and channel customers a broad array of high-performance flash solutions across personal computer, mobile, gaming, automotive, virtual reality headsets, at-home entertainment, and industrial spaces.

Through the Client end market, we provide our original equipment manufacturer and channel customers a broad array of high-performance flash solutions across personal computer, mobile, gaming, automotive, virtual reality headsets, at-home entertainment, and industrial spaces.

catalysts.event: Flash Ventures to begin manufacturing at eighth facility in Japan
catalysts.sentence: Flash Ventures will begin flash-based manufacturing operations at an eighth facility in Japan in calendar year 2025.

catalysts.event: Anticipated underutilization charges in first quarter of fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate incurring some underutilization charges as we moderate production levels to align with demand for our products in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Increased capital investments for node transition in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: For fiscal year 2026, we anticipate increased capital investments as we transition to newer nodes to meet the demand and technology needs of our product portfolio.
